____ARCHITECT_NOTE____: This prompt was engineered by a 30-year senior full-stack architect. Every pixel, every interaction, every line of logic is deliberate. This must NOT look AI-generated. It must look like a $200,000 agency build.

project.name: V3 Tour & Travels
project.type: Futuristic Premium Travel Booking Platform — Multi-Page React SPA
project.build_standard: PRODUCTION — ZERO PLACEHOLDERS — ZERO BROKEN LOGIC — ZERO AI AESTHETIC

design_philosophy.direction: FUTURISTIC DEEP SPACE LUXURY — Think Tesla website meets Singapore Airlines meets SpaceX careers page
design_philosophy.must_feel_like: A 30-year veteran full-stack developer and designer crafted every detail by hand over 3 months

color_system.rationale: Deep Space Navy + Electric Teal — premium, futuristic, trustworthy, UNIQUE in Indian travel market

futuristic_font.name: Chakra Petch
futuristic_font.usage: Stats numbers, loading screen, badges, distance/time chips

scale.hero_h1: font-size: clamp(3.2rem, 7vw, 6.5rem); font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -0.025em; font-family: Cabinet Grotesk
scale.h2_section: font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem); font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.02em; font-family: Cabinet Grotesk
scale.label_caps: font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; font-family: Satoshi
scale.stat_number: font-size: clamp(2.5rem, 5vw, 4rem); font-weight: 600; font-family: Chakra Petch

loading_screen.concept: Full-screen intro that plays once per session. A single electric teal speed-line sweeps LEFT → RIGHT across the screen, then the letters of 'V3 TOUR & TRAVELS' clip in left-to-right with a 55ms stagger per character. A progress bar fills below. Fades out cleanly revealing the site.

implementation.logo_style: font-family: Chakra Petch; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 5vw, 3.5rem); font-weight: 600; color: #EEF4FF; letter-spacing: 0.15em; text-transform: uppercase

animation_sequence.css: div with height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #00D4C8, #00FFED, transparent); transform: translateX(-100%); animation: speedLine 400ms ease-out forwards; @keyframes speedLine { to { transform: translateX(100vw); } }

animation_sequence.technique: Split 'V3 TOUR & TRAVELS' into individual span elements. Each span: overflow: hidden; display: inline-block. Inner text: transform: translateY(100%); animation: charIn 300ms ease-out forwards; @keyframes charIn { to { transform: translateY(0); } }. Delay: index * 55ms
animation_sequence.teal_accent: V and 3 characters are colored #00D4C8 — rest are #EEF4FF

animation_sequence.style: font-family: Satoshi; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em; color: rgba(0,212,200,0.6); text-transform: uppercase; animation: fadeIn 500ms ease-out 1200ms both

position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #00D4C8, #38BDF8); animation: progressFill 2000ms ease-in-out forwards; @keyframes progressFill { from { width: 0%; } to { width: 100%; } }

animation_sequence.css: animation: fadeOut 400ms ease-out 2000ms forwards; @keyframes fadeOut { to { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; } }

logo.concept: V3 geometric monogram — the V is formed by two diagonal speed-lines converging, the 3 is clean and modern. Together they suggest a road converging to a vanishing point — the journey ahead.

svg_implementation.v_letter: Two diagonal lines forming V shape — stroke: #00D4C8; stroke-width: 2.5; fill: none — lines: M10,4 L30,36 M50,4 L30,36
svg_implementation.3_number: Modern 3 shape — fill: #EEF4FF; font-family: Chakra Petch; positioned at x:58 y:32 — font-size:32px
svg_implementation.speed_lines: 3 horizontal lines to right of V — widths 20px, 15px, 10px — y positions spaced — stroke: #00D4C8; opacity: 0.4, 0.25, 0.12
svg_implementation.animated: On hover: speed lines extend with CSS transform scaleX — origin left — duration 300ms

logo.text_variant: V3 in Chakra Petch 600 teal + 'Tour & Travels' in Satoshi 400 pearl below or beside

navbar.initial_state: Fully transparent — logo + nav links visible — no background
navbar.scrolled_state: After 60px scroll: backdrop-filter: blur(20px) saturate(180%); background: rgba(3,5,26,0.85); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,212,200,0.1); transition: all 400ms ease

nav_links.style: font-family: Satoshi; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(238,244,255,0.7); hover: color #00D4C8
nav_links.hover_effect: ::after pseudo underline that scales from 0 to 100% width on hover — background: #00D4C8; height: 1px; transition: transform 250ms ease

cta_button.style: bg: transparent; border: 1.5px solid #00D4C8; color: #00D4C8; border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 22px; font-family: Satoshi; font-weight: 600; transition: all 250ms; hover: bg #00D4C8 color #03051A shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,212,200,0.4)

mobile_menu.trigger: Hamburger icon — 3 lines animate to X
mobile_menu.overlay: Full screen — bg: #03051A/97 backdrop-blur — all nav links stacked center — Book Now button large at bottom — close icon top right

three_js_scene.mount: useEffect — canvas inside ref div — cleanup on unmount
three_js_scene.performance: requestAnimationFrame cancel on unmount; dispose geometries/materials; pixelRatio: Math.min(devicePixelRatio, 2); pause on document.hidden
three_js_scene.renderer: WebGLRenderer({ antialias: true, alpha: true }); setSize; setClearColor(0x000000, 0)

road.road_markings: 16 BoxGeometry(0.05, 0.002, 0.7) painted white (opacity 0.7) spaced evenly along Z — animated: marking.position.z += 0.09 per frame; reset when z > 2.5 → z = -45

teal_headlight_beams.geometry: Two ConeGeometry(0.9, 14, 6, 1, true) — left at (-0.4, 0.3, 0.5), right at (0.4, 0.3, 0.5)
teal_headlight_beams.material: MeshBasicMaterial — color #00D4C8 — transparent true — opacity: 0.05 — side: DoubleSide

city_horizon.positions: Clustered z: -40 to -60, x: -10 to 10, y: 0 to 5 (skyline heights)
city_horizon.mix: 80 teal points + 40 blue (#38BDF8) + 20 white — random assignment
city_horizon.animation: per-point y += Math.sin(time + i * 0.4) * 0.005 — city breathes

teal_glow_road_edge.concept: Two thin lines along road edges with teal emissive glow — like LED road strips

three_js_scene.fallback: If WebGL unavailable: CSS radial-gradient background with animated pseudo road lines

particles.library: tsParticles loaded via: const script = document.createElement('script'); script.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/tsparticles@2.12.0/tsparticles.bundle.min.js'; — wait for onload then init

mouse_parallax.concept: 3D canvas div subtly shifts opposite to mouse — gives depth feeling
mouse_parallax.implementation: onMouseMove on hero: const xRatio = (e.clientX / window.innerWidth - 0.5); const yRatio = (e.clientY / window.innerHeight - 0.5); canvasRef.current.style.transform = `translate(${xRatio * -18}px, ${yRatio * -12}px)`; — transition: transform 800ms ease-out

layers: z-1: Three.js canvas absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none — mouse-parallax transform
z-2: tsParticles canvas absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none
z-3: gradient overlays — top: linear from #03051A/60 to transparent — bottom: linear from transparent to #03051A — sides: radial vignette
z-10: hero content flex column items-center justify-center h-full pt-[68px]

badge.style: inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-[rgba(0,212,200,0.08)] border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.2)] rounded-full px-5 py-1.5 text-[#00D4C8] text-xs font-medium tracking-[0.15em] uppercase font-[Satoshi] backdrop-blur-sm

headline.style: font-family: Cabinet Grotesk; font-size: clamp(3.2rem,7vw,6.5rem); font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -0.025em; color: #EEF4FF; text-align: center

tagline.style: font-family: Chakra Petch; font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.3em; color: rgba(0,212,200,0.55); text-transform: uppercase; margin-top: 12px

description.text: Premium taxi & outstation travel from Ludhiana. Chandigarh · Delhi · Amritsar · All of Punjab. Professional drivers. Zero hidden charges.
description.style: font-family: Satoshi; font-size: clamp(1rem,2vw,1.15rem); color: rgba(238,244,255,0.55); max-width: 500px; line-height: 1.75; text-align: center; margin-top: 16px

primary_cta.style: bg-[#00D4C8] text-[#03051A] font-bold font-[Satoshi] rounded-full px-9 py-4 text-base hover:bg-[#00FFED] transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,212,200,0.35)] hover:shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(0,212,200,0.6)] hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
primary_cta.shimmer: overflow-hidden relative ::before absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-transparent via-white/25 to-transparent -translate-x-full hover:translate-x-full transition-transform duration-600

whatsapp_cta.action: window.open('https://wa.me/919888000510?text=' + encodeURIComponent('Hi V3! I want to book a ride. 🚗'), '_blank')
whatsapp_cta.style: border border-[rgba(238,244,255,0.15)] hover:border-[#00D4C8]/40 text-[#EEF4FF] font-[Satoshi] font-semibold rounded-full px-9 py-4 text-base flex items-center gap-2.5 hover:bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105

trust_strip.layout: flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-x-8 gap-y-2 margin-top: 40px
trust_strip.style: font-family: Satoshi; font-size: 0.75rem; color: rgba(238,244,255,0.35); — ✓ color: #00D4C8

scroll_indicator.design: SVG of a mouse outline with a dot inside that animates downward. Below: 'SCROLL' in Chakra Petch 0.55rem 0.2em spacing
scroll_indicator.animation: dot: translateY(0) opacity:1 → translateY(8px) opacity:0 — 1.8s infinite

booking_form_section.concept: A stunning glassmorphism dark card that feels like a spacecraft control panel. It floats with a teal halo glow underneath it. Positioned as -mt-20 relative z-20 to overlap the hero fade.
booking_form_section.outer_wrapper: relative z-20 -mt-20 px-4 md:px-6 max-w-5xl mx-auto

card.glow_orb_under: absolute -bottom-8 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-3/4 h-8 bg-[#00D4C8] opacity-[0.06] blur-2xl rounded-full pointer-events-none

header.label: BOOK YOUR RIDE
header.label_style: font-family: Chakra Petch; font-size: 0.65rem; letter-spacing: 0.25em; color: #00D4C8; text-transform: uppercase
header.title: Where are you going?
header.title_style: font-family: Cabinet Grotesk; font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: 800; color: #EEF4FF; margin-top: 4px

booking_form_section.input_style: w-full bg-[rgba(238,244,255,0.04)] border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.12)] focus:border-[#00D4C8] focus:bg-[rgba(0,212,200,0.04)] text-[#EEF4FF] placeholder-[rgba(238,244,255,0.25)] rounded-xl px-4 py-3.5 text-sm font-[Satoshi] outline-none transition-all duration-200 focus:shadow-[0_0_0_3px_rgba(0,212,200,0.1),inset_0_0_20px_rgba(0,212,200,0.03)]
booking_form_section.label_style: block font-family: Chakra Petch; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(238,244,255,0.4); margin-bottom: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px

car_selector.label_style: same label_style as above — display full width below the 2-col grid
car_selector.unselected: border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.1)] bg-[rgba(238,244,255,0.03)] rounded-2xl p-4 cursor-pointer transition-all duration-250 hover:border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.3)] hover:bg-[rgba(0,212,200,0.04)] text-center
car_selector.selected: border border-[#00D4C8] bg-[rgba(0,212,200,0.08)] rounded-2xl p-4 cursor-pointer shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,212,200,0.12),inset_0_0_20px_rgba(0,212,200,0.03)] text-center
car_selector.popular_badge: absolute -top-2.5 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-[#00D4C8] text-[#03051A] text-[8px] font-bold font-[Chakra Petch] px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full uppercase tracking-wider

submit.valid_style: w-full mt-6 bg-[#00D4C8] hover:bg-[#00FFED] text-[#03051A] font-bold font-[Cabinet Grotesk] rounded-2xl py-4 text-base flex items-center justify-center gap-3 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,212,200,0.45)] hover:scale-[1.01] active:scale-[0.99]
submit.invalid_style: w-full mt-6 bg-[rgba(238,244,255,0.04)] border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.1)] text-[rgba(238,244,255,0.2)] font-[Cabinet Grotesk] rounded-2xl py-4 text-base cursor-not-allowed
submit.icon: WhatsApp SVG green 18px (only in valid state)
submit.sparkle_on_click: canvas-based teal particle burst from button center — 10 particles fly outward and fade

booking_form_section.note_below: ⚡ Instant reply · 🔒 Price locked before trip · 💳 Cash / UPI accepted

ai_booking_assistant.concept: A fully conversational AI booking bot — custom state machine — no external AI API — collects all 5 booking fields through conversation, then sends to WhatsApp. This is V3's secret weapon. It feels like a real travel concierge.

trigger_button.design: Circular button 56px — bg: #00D4C8 — icon: custom chat/sparkle SVG in dark — shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(0,212,200,0.4) — animation: ring pulse (box-shadow expand and fade — 2s infinite)
trigger_button.label: Tooltip on hover: 'Book with V3 AI'
trigger_button.unread_dot: Small red dot top-right when chat has new message

chat_panel.desktop: fixed bottom-24 right-6 w-[380px] h-[540px] — rounded-2xl — glass card — z-50

header.logo: V3 logo small + status dot green + 'V3 Travel Assistant' name + 'Online' status
header.close_btn: X icon — closes panel — top right

chat_panel.messages_area: flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-4 flex flex-col gap-3 — custom scrollbar teal

input_area.style: border-t border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.1)] px-3 py-3 flex gap-2
input_area.input: flex-1 bg-[rgba(238,244,255,0.05)] border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.12)] rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-sm text-[#EEF4FF] placeholder-[rgba(238,244,255,0.3)] outline-none focus:border-[#00D4C8]
input_area.send_btn: bg-[#00D4C8] text-[#03051A] rounded-xl px-3 py-2 — Send icon

message_bubbles.ai_bubble: max-w-[85%] bg-[rgba(0,212,200,0.08)] border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.12)] rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm px-4 py-3 text-[#EEF4FF] text-sm font-[Satoshi] leading-relaxed — self-start — animate: fade-in slide-in-from-left duration-300
message_bubbles.user_bubble: max-w-[85%] bg-[#00D4C8] text-[#03051A] rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-4 py-3 text-sm font-[Satoshi] font-medium — self-end — animate: fade-in slide-in-from-right duration-300
message_bubbles.typewriter: AI messages appear character by character — 28ms per char — using setInterval + useState

quick_chips.design: Row of tappable suggestion chips below AI message
quick_chips.style: flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-2 — each chip: border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.2)] text-[#00D4C8] text-xs font-[Satoshi] rounded-full px-3 py-1 cursor-pointer hover:bg-[rgba(0,212,200,0.1)] transition-colors

idle.ai_message: Hi there! 👋 I'm your V3 Travel Assistant. I can book a ride for you in under 60 seconds. Ready to go? 🚗

collecting_pickup.ai_message: Great! 🎯 Where should I pick you up from? (City, landmark, or address)

collecting_drop.ai_message:
Got it — picking up from **{pickup}**. ✅

Where are you headed?

collecting_date.ai_message:
Perfect! **{pickup} → {drop}** it is. 🗺️

What date do you need the ride?

collecting_time.ai_message:
Got the date — **{date}**. ✅

What time should I pick you up?

collecting_car.ai_message: Almost there! 🚙 Which vehicle type do you prefer?

confirming.ai_message:
Here's your booking summary:

📍 From: **{pickup}**
🏁 To: **{drop}**
📅 Date: **{date}**
⏰ Time: **{time}**
🚘 Vehicle: **{carType}**

Shall I send this to V3 on WhatsApp for confirmation?

sent.ai_message: Done! 🎉 Your booking request has been sent to V3 Tour & Travels on WhatsApp. They'll confirm shortly. Have a comfortable journey! ✈️

conversation_flow.date_handling: If user says 'Today' → new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-IN') — 'Tomorrow' → new Date(Date.now()+86400000).toLocaleDateString('en-IN') — 'This Weekend' → next Saturday — otherwise prompt to type
conversation_flow.time_handling: If user picks 'Early Morning' → '6:00 AM' — 'Morning' → '9:00 AM' — 'Afternoon' → '2:00 PM' — 'Evening' → '6:00 PM'
conversation_flow.reset_command: If user types 'reset', 'start over', 'cancel' → reset state to idle

services_section.bg: #03051A — diagonal micro-grid pattern: background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, rgba(0,212,200,0.02) 0px, rgba(0,212,200,0.02) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 60px)
services_section.label: WHAT WE OFFER
services_section.headline:
Every Journey,
Perfectly Handled.
services_section.headline_style: Cabinet Grotesk 900 clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem) — 'Every Journey,' pearl white — 'Perfectly Handled.' teal
services_section.card_3d_tilt: onMouseMove: perspective(800px) rotateX(-Ydeg) rotateY(Xdeg) translateZ(6px) — max ±10deg — onMouseLeave: reset with transition 600ms
services_section.card_style: relative bg-[#0A0F2E] border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.1)] rounded-2xl p-7 overflow-hidden group cursor-default transition-all duration-400 hover:border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_20px_60px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5),0_0_30px_rgba(0,212,200,0.06)]
services_section.icon_wrap: w-11 h-11 rounded-xl bg-[rgba(0,212,200,0.1)] flex items-center justify-center mb-5 group-hover:bg-[rgba(0,212,200,0.18)] transition-colors duration-300

services.title: One-Way Taxi
services.desc: Direct city-to-city rides. No round-trip requirement. Pay only for what you need.

services.title: Round Trip
services.desc: Book both legs with one call. Relaxed travel there and back with the same trusted driver.

services.title: Airport Transfer
services.desc: Flight-tracked pickups and drops. Never miss a flight. Always on time, every time.

services.title: Local City Rides
services.desc: Hourly rentals for local travel within Ludhiana, Chandigarh, or Amritsar.

services.title: Outstation Travel
services.desc: Multi-city journeys across Punjab, Haryana, Delhi NCR, and the Himalayas.

services.title: Corporate Travel
services.desc: Professional, punctual travel solutions for business events. Bulk packages available.

map_visual.concept: A stylized India/Punjab SVG map — minimalist — Punjab state highlighted with a teal fill — route cities marked with glowing dots — dotted animated lines connecting them
map_visual.implementation: SVG element — Punjab region path filled with rgba(0,212,200,0.08) border stroke #00D4C8 opacity 0.3 — 6 city dots at approximate lat/long positions — each dot: r=4 fill #00D4C8 glow animation — stroke-dasharray animated lines between cities
map_visual.route_lines: stroke-dasharray: 6 4; stroke-dashoffset animated from 100 to 0 on scroll reveal — color: #00D4C8 opacity 0.35

route_cards.card_style: relative bg-[#0A0F2E] border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.1)] rounded-2xl p-5 cursor-pointer group transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.35)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,212,200,0.07)] overflow-hidden
route_cards.click_action: setBookingState({pickup: from, drop: to}); setTimeout(() => scrollTo('#booking'), 100)
route_cards.route_arrow_icon: ArrowUpRight top-right — text-[rgba(0,212,200,0.3)] group-hover:text-[#00D4C8] group-hover:translate-x-0.5 group-hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all
route_cards.route_display: font-family: Cabinet Grotesk; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.05rem; color: #EEF4FF — FROM ──→ TO
route_cards.meta_chips: flex gap-2 mt-2.5 — chip: bg-[rgba(238,244,255,0.04)] border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.1)] rounded-full px-3 py-0.5 text-xs font-[Chakra Petch] text-[rgba(238,244,255,0.45)]
route_cards.book_link: mt-4 text-xs font-[Satoshi] font-semibold text-[#00D4C8] group-hover:underline flex items-center gap-1
route_cards.tag_style: absolute top-4 right-4 text-[8px] font-[Chakra Petch] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider bg-[rgba(0,212,200,0.1)] text-[#00D4C8] border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.2)] rounded-full px-2 py-0.5

fleet_section.label: OUR FLEET
fleet_section.headline:
Choose Your
Perfect Ride.
fleet_section.layout: 3 cards — center card elevated scale-[1.04] — has teal glow border

w-32 h-32 mx-auto rounded-full bg-[rgba(0,212,200,0.1)] shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(0,212,200,0.2)] flex items-center justify-center mb-6

cars.platform_style: w-32 h-32 mx-auto rounded-full bg-[rgba(56,189,248,0.05)] border border-[rgba(56,189,248,0.15)] flex items-center justify-center mb-6

fleet_section.cta_style: w-full mt-6 border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.25)] text-[#00D4C8] font-[Cabinet Grotesk] font-bold rounded-xl py-3 text-sm hover:bg-[rgba(0,212,200,0.08)] hover:border-[#00D4C8] transition-all duration-200
fleet_section.highlighted_cta_style: w-full mt-6 bg-[#00D4C8] text-[#03051A] font-[Cabinet Grotesk] font-bold rounded-xl py-3 text-sm hover:bg-[#00FFED] transition-all duration-200 shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(0,212,200,0.3)]

why_v3_section.label: WHY V3?
why_v3_section.headline:
The Standard Others
Aim For.
why_v3_section.layout: Two column — left: animated stats + decorative V3 logo — right: feature list

left.v3_visual: Large 'V3' text — Cabinet Grotesk 900 — font-size: 10rem — color: transparent — background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00D4C8, #38BDF8, #00FFED) — -webkit-background-clip: text — filter: drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(0,212,200,0.3)) — animation: subtleFloat 4s ease-in-out infinite — @keyframes subtleFloat: 0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)} 50%{transform:translateY(-10px)}
left.counter_animation: CountUp effect: useEffect + setInterval — increments number from 0 to target over 1500ms when section enters viewport — Intersection Observer trigger
left.stat_number_style: font-family: Chakra Petch; font-size: clamp(2.5rem,4vw,3.5rem); font-weight: 600; color: #00D4C8; line-height: 1
left.stat_label_style: font-family: Satoshi; font-size: 0.8rem; color: rgba(238,244,255,0.4); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-top: 4px

reviews.name: Harpreet Singh
reviews.text: 4 AM airport drop, driver was 10 minutes early, car spotless. No stress at all. V3 is simply the best travel service in Punjab.

reviews.name: Anita Sharma
reviews.text: Price was exactly what they quoted on WhatsApp. Comfortable Innova, professional driver. Will always use V3 for my family trips.

reviews.name: Rajiv Malhotra
reviews.text: Round trip to Delhi was smooth and comfortable. Driver was polite, stopped for breaks, and kept the car cool the whole way. Excellent service!

reviews.name: Gurpreet Kaur
reviews.text: WhatsApp booking was done in 2 minutes. No app, no hassle. The V3 AI assistant helped me book even faster. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Vikram Bhatia
reviews.text: Used V3 for a client pickup from Delhi. Premium Crysta, chauffeur in formals, arrived on time. Our company now has V3 on speed dial.

testimonials_section.avatar_style: w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-[#00D4C8] to-[#38BDF8] flex items-center justify-center text-[#03051A] font-bold text-sm font-[Cabinet Grotesk]
testimonials_section.trip_badge: text-[9px] font-[Chakra Petch] font-semibold bg-[rgba(0,212,200,0.08)] text-[#00D4C8] border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.2)] rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 uppercase tracking-wider

pricing_section.label: PRICING
pricing_section.headline:
No Surprises.
Ever.

left.body: We share your full fare on WhatsApp before confirming. What we quote is exactly what you pay. No meter running. No surprise additions.

notes.title: Dynamic Pricing
notes.desc: Fare based on route, distance, and vehicle type. Flat rate — not metered.

notes.title: State Tax Outside Punjab
notes.desc: Delhi, Haryana, HP may have border taxes — always included in your quote.

notes.title: Parking Actuals
notes.desc: Airport parking if any — charged at actuals — always communicated in advance.

notes.title: Cash / UPI / Transfer
notes.desc: Multiple payment options. Details shared after booking confirmation.

pricing_section.note_card: flex items-start gap-4 p-5 bg-[#0A0F2E] border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.1)] rounded-2xl hover:border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.25)] transition-colors

faq_section.label: FAQ
faq_section.headline:
Questions
Answered.
faq_section.accordion_wrap: border border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.1)] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden divide-y divide-[rgba(0,212,200,0.06)] bg-[#0A0F2E]
faq_section.item_header: flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-5 cursor-pointer hover:bg-[rgba(0,212,200,0.03)] transition-colors group select-none
faq_section.answer_style: px-6 pb-5 font-family: Satoshi; font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgba(238,244,255,0.5); line-height: 1.7
faq_section.animation: max-height: 0 → 200px — overflow hidden — transition 350ms ease — one open at a time

items.q: How do I book a ride?
items.a: Fill the booking form on this page and click 'Book via WhatsApp' — or chat with our V3 AI Assistant. A formatted message opens in WhatsApp — hit send and we confirm within minutes.

items.q: How is the final price calculated?
items.a: Price is based on route, distance, and vehicle type. We share the complete fare on WhatsApp before you confirm. Flat rate — no meter, no surprises.
Yes. Inform us at least 2 hours before your pickup via WhatsApp or call. Most advance cancellations are penalty-free.
A small surcharge may apply for trips starting between 11 PM and 5 AM. This is always included in your quote — never added afterward.
We cover all outstation routes — Delhi, Haryana, Himachal Pradesh, Rajasthan, J&K. State border taxes (if any) are clearly listed in your quote.
Parking is charged at actuals and communicated clearly in your quote before the trip. Never a surprise.
100%. All V3 drivers are background-verified, hold valid commercial licenses, and are trained in safety and professional conduct.

items.q: What is the V3 AI Assistant?
items.a: It's our built-in travel assistant that can book your ride through a quick chat — right here on the website. It collects your details and sends everything to WhatsApp for confirmation.

final_cta_section.sub: Book in 60 seconds. Available 24/7 across Punjab and beyond.

col1_brand.logo: Full V3 SVG logo — teal variant

mobile_sticky_bar.visibility: md:hidden — fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-40
mobile_sticky_bar.trigger: visible after scrollY > 250 — transition: transform 400ms ease-out — hidden: translateY(100%)
mobile_sticky_bar.style: bg-[rgba(3,5,26,0.95)] backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[rgba(0,212,200,0.15)] px-4 py-3
mobile_sticky_bar.call: bg-[#00D4C8] text-[#03051A] font-bold rounded-xl py-3 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-sm — tel: link
mobile_sticky_bar.whatsapp: bg-[#22C55E] text-white font-bold rounded-xl py-3 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-sm — wa.me link

scroll_reveal_system.stagger: each child: animation-delay: calc(var(--index, 0) * 80ms) — set via style={{--index: i}}
scroll_reveal_system.headings: split into two spans — each animates with 100ms offset
scroll_reveal_system.counters: trigger CountUp when Why V3 section enters viewport

state_architecture.root_state: const [booking, setBooking] = useState({ pickup: '', drop: '', date: '', time: '', carType: '' })
state_architecture.validity: const isValid = booking.pickup.trim().length >= 3 && booking.drop.trim().length >= 3 && booking.date && booking.time && booking.carType
state_architecture.ai_state: const [chat, setChat] = useState({ open: false, state: 'idle', messages: [], collected: {} })
state_architecture.prop_drilling: Pass booking + setBooking to BookingForm, FleetSection, RoutesSection — pass prefill to route/fleet CTAs

performance.three_js: Cleanup all geometries, materials, textures, renderer on unmount. Pause rAF on tab hidden.
performance.fonts: fontshare + Google Fonts with display=swap. Non-blocking.
performance.3d_tilt: Disabled on touch devices: if('ontouchstart' in window) skip tilt handler
performance.images: Zero external images. All visuals via emoji, SVG, CSS gradients.
performance.will_change: Apply will-change:transform only to actively animating elements. Remove after animation.
performance.session_loader: sessionStorage check skips loading animation on revisit

final_instruction: Build the COMPLETE V3 Tour & Travels futuristic travel booking website exactly as described in this JSON. This is a REAL premium taxi business in Ludhiana, Punjab, India. The color palette is DEEP SPACE NAVY + ELECTRIC TEAL + PEARL WHITE — absolutely NO black/gold. Fonts: Cabinet Grotesk + Satoshi + Chakra Petch. The loading screen must play on first visit with left-to-right letter animation. The hero must have a Three.js 3D night highway with TEAL LED road edges, teal headlight beams, teal city particles. The V3 AI Booking Assistant chatbot must work as a complete conversational booking flow — collecting all 5 fields through chat chips and text input — ending with a WhatsApp message. Every card must have CSS 3D tilt. All booking CTAs must prefill the form and scroll to it. The site must look like it was handcrafted by a 30-year senior developer — NOT AI-generated. Zero placeholders. Zero broken logic. This is the world's best taxi booking website.
